articles.title: Datacenter Capex is Spilling over into a ChatGPT of Robotics Moment set for 2027 and this decade.
articles.content:
大家好，我是迈克。每周我都会分享关于科技、商业、社会与未来交叉领域的AI文章。如果你想支持这个频道或获取我全部作品的完整访问权限，请点击这里。阅读往期文章 | 查看Substack笔记 | 加入我们的社区聊天 | 访问主页。我一直在追踪机器人技术的发展，注意到它与国防开支之间正在出现显著融合。这对于我们的公民、城市和经济来说，一个DARPA式的时刻正在到来。

早上好，我想分享我最近一直在思考的一些想法——既作为一名新兴技术分析师，也从一个人道主义和文明的角度来看。这股趋势如何扩展和叠加，将需要极其密集的资本投入。

“自动化、更紧张的劳动力市场和一个转型后的未来，全都压缩在短短一代人的时间内。但代价是什么？”

当我们的建设未来的能力超过了我们资本体系的杠杆时会发生什么？当这种推动如此激进，以至于人们和社区开始反抗时又会怎样？AI、数据中心和机器人技术的资本支出将会得到答案。我开始感到有些担忧。风险投资和大科技公司正在与公共利益分道扬镳，进入一个新民族主义时代。一个主导性的、国家支持的技术未来立场正在2020年代成形。

对于美国的金融精英来说，资助AI数据中心、AI芯片和高带宽内存芯片一直利润丰厚，他们肯定也会对机器人和物理AI做同样的事情。这与拟议中增加的国防资金有关，这些资金将流入无人机、火箭公司和太空技术领域。在美国国债正变得不可持续的时刻，他们这样做将以未来公民的巨额代价为代价，并将债务转嫁给后代。当我追踪AI的发展和风险投资趋势时，这场运动似乎越来越与消费者和公民的实际需求脱节（更多内容将在后续文章中讨论）。

其资本支出、研发和资助的规模与过去有着根本性的不同。它将深刻改变人类秩序。在未来十年债务危机如海啸般来临之前，这是一段资本狂热时期。机器人和债务正在到来，这引入了一种我们几代人未曾见过的新型地缘政治和亲创新、亲国防风格的政府（讽刺的是，这正变得越来越像中国）。包括硅谷的物理AI和华尔街对AI的推动，这似乎是一个有组织的机制的下一阶段，旨在将股市繁荣延长数年。
articles.summary:
👋 Hey there, I’m Mike. Each week I share AI articles at the intersection of tech, business, society and the future. If you want to support the channel or gain full-access to my work, go here. Read Archives | See Substack Notes | Visit our community Chat | Visit Homepage. I’ve been tracking robotics and I’m noticing a significant convergence with National Defense spending. It’s a DARPA moment coming for our citizens, cities and economies.

Get Full Access

Good Morning,

I want to share what I’ve been thinking about recently as an emerging technology analyst but also from a humanitarian and civilization based perspective. How this trend scales and compounds is going to be extremely capital intensive.

“Automation, tighter labor markets and a transformed future all within one generation. But at what costs?”

What happens when our capacity to build the future outruns even the leverage of our capital systems? When it’s pushed so aggressively, people and communities begin to rebel? The AI, datacenter and robotics capex is going to find out. I am starting to become a little bit concerned. Venture Capital and BigTech are beginning to diverge from the public good in a new era of Neo-Nationalism. A dominant State backed position towards the future of technology is taking shape in the 2020s.

For America’s financial elite, funding AI datacenters, AI chips and HBM chips has been so profitable they will surely do the same thing with robots and physical AI. This is related to the proposed increase in National defending funding that will pour into drones, rocket companies and space-technology as well. At time when America’s national debt is becoming unsustainable - they will do so at a great cost to future citizens and passing it on to future generations. As I track AI’s development and Venture Capital trends this movement seems increasingly unhinged from what consumers and citizens actually want (more on this in future articles).

It’s at a scale of capital expenditures, R&D and funding that is fundamentally divergent from the past. It will profoundly change the human order of things. A capital frenzy period before a decade where a debt crisis will linger like a coming Tsunami. The robots and debt are coming and this introduces a new Geopolitics and pro-innovation and Defense style of Government that we have not seen in many generations (ironically becoming more like China). Including Physical AI in Silicon Valley and Wall Street’s push of AI, that appears to be the next phase in an organized mechanism to extend the stock market boom by several years.

Read more
